basic_details.job_title: HBCSE Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Project Scientific Officer, Project Scientific Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Homi Bhabha Centre for Science Education (HBCSE)
basic_details.post_name: Project Scientific Officer - B and Project Scientific Assistant - B
basic_details.short_information: Homi Bhabha Centre for Science Education (HBCSE) has released the official Project Scientific Officer B and Project Scientific Assistant B Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. 02/2026 at https://www.hbcse.tifr.res.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the HBCSE Project Scientific Officer B/ Project Scientific Assistant B Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a Master's degree in Physics/ Applied Physics/ Astrophysics/ Electronics/ Computer Science or equivalent, B.E./ B.Tech in relevant Engineering disciplines with 60% marks, or B.Sc./ B.S. with 60% marks, and a maximu

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years for all posts. Age relaxation as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in Physics/Applied Physics/Astrophysics/Electronics/Computer Science or equivalent, B.E./B.Tech in relevant Engineering subjects with 60% marks, B.Sc./B.S. in any subject with 60% marks
qualification.details: Project Scientific Officer B: Full Time Master’s degree in Science (Physics / Applied Physics / Astrophysics / Electronics / Computer Science or equivalent) or Full Time B.E./B.Tech in Computer / Electronics / Mechanical / Electrical / Aeronautical Engineering / Applied Physics / Engineering Physics or equivalent with 60% marks or equivalent CGPA. No minimum work experience necessary. Project Scientific Assistant B: Full time B.Sc./B.S. in any subject from a recognized University/Institute with aggregate of 60% marks or equivalent CGPA. Knowledge of use of personal computers and its applications. 0 to 2 years’ post qualification experience.

salary_details.details: Project Scientific Officer B: Rs. 84200/- (Incl. of HRA Rs. 12852/-) Per Month Project Scientific Assistant B: Rs. 63900/- (Incl. of HRA Rs. 9558/-) Per Month

selection_process: Walk-in Selection Written Test Skill Test Interview Document Verification

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for HBCSE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in selection for Project Scientific Assistant - B is on 07 July 2026, and for Project Scientific Officer - B, it is on 16 July 2026. Candidates should attend on the respective dates.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for Project Scientific Officer - B?
faq.answer: A Master’s degree in Physics, Applied Physics, Astrophysics, Electronics, Computer Science or equivalent, or a B.E./B.Tech in relevant engineering subjects with 60% marks is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the posts announced by HBCSE?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the announced posts is 28 years, with age relaxation applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for HBCSE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for Project Scientific Assistant - B?
faq.answer: The salary for Project Scientific Assistant - B is Rs. 63900/- per month, which includes HRA.

faq.question: Q6. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Selection, Written Test, Skill Test, Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The specific venue address is not detailed here but can be found in the official notification PDF. Candidates should check the notification for the exact location.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any work experience required for Project Scientific Officer - B?
faq.answer: No, there is no minimum work experience required for the Project Scientific Officer - B position.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies announced by HBCSE?
faq.answer: HBCSE has announced a total of 2 vacancies for the posts of Project Scientific Officer - B and Project Scientific Assistant - B.
